# Error Code List

This chapter lists the error codes that may be returned during the interface call of Sigenergy Openapi and their corresponding description information, which is convenient for service providers to quickly locate problems, troubleshoot faults, and ensure the smooth interface interaction process.

| NO. | Error Code | Description                                             |
| --- | ---------- | ------------------------------------------------------- |
| 1   | 0          | Success                                                 |
| 2   | 1000       | Param illegal                                           |
| 3   | 1101       | Wrong serial                                            |
| 4   | 1102       | Registration incomplete                                 |
| 5   | 1103       | In other VPP                                            |
| 6   | 1104       | Device offline                                          |
| 7   | 1105       | Current software version does not support VPP           |
| 8   | 1106       | Station was not found                                   |
| 9   | 1107       | AIO units and Inverters only                            |
| 10  | 1108       | Station info not found                                  |
| 11  | 1109       | RPC fail                                                |
| 12  | 1110       | Interface is current-limited                            |
| 13  | 1111       | Station not permitted                                   |
| 14  | 1112       | In other VPP (Evergen)                                  |
| 15  | 1201       | Access restriction                                      |
| 16  | 1301       | Client not found                                        |
| 17  | 1302       | Station status anomaly                                  |
| 18  | 1303       | Client has existed                                      |
| 19  | 1304       | Firmware version mismatch                               |
| 20  | 1401       | No permission to operate this station                   |
| 21  | 1402       | No permission                                           |
| 22  | 1501       | Failed to execute command                               |
| 23  | 1502       | Sigenergy system internal error                         |
| 24  | 1503       | The power station has the anti-backflow setting enabled |
| 25  | 1504       | The power station has enabled peak shaving              |
| 26  | 1600       | The invitation is invalid                               |
| 27  | 1601       | Account system error                                    |
| 28  | 1602       | Account already registered                              |
| 29  | 1603       | Account unReviewed                                      |
| 30  | 1604       | Developer not approved                                  |
